speakers.bio: Leads Meridian's applied AI organization, focused on retrieval and agent orchestration at enterprise scale. Former research scientist in information retrieval; keynote speaker on grounding and evaluation.
Ships agentic AI deployments inside Fortune 500 customer environments. Known for pragmatic delivery patterns and honest talks about what breaks in production.
Runs the platform org behind Northwind's customer-facing AI. Focus areas: vector infrastructure, latency, and cost control for RAG at scale.
Works on LLM serving infrastructure and function-calling reliability. Frequent contributor to open evaluation frameworks.
Leads the developer community and hands-on education programs. Designs the workshop and certification curriculum for Meridian Summit.
Specializes in security for AI systems: prompt injection defense, data governance, and access control for retrieval pipelines.
Enterprise CTO who has taken multiple AI programs from pilot to production across retail operations. Speaks on organizational readiness and change management.
Builds evaluation harnesses and offline scoring pipelines for production retrieval and agent systems. Advocate for measurement-first AI delivery.
